'''鈭歴-sh-b''' ('''sashaba''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:umbrella|umbrella]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-sh-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:umbrella|umbrella]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歴-sh-b
|-
! Lemma
| sashaba
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:sashabithi|sashabithi]] || [[word:sashabiji|sashabiji]] || [[word:sashabishi|sashabishi]] || [[word:sashabi|sashabi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:sashabuthuth|sashabuthuth]] || [[word:sashabujuj|sashabujuj]] || [[word:sashabushush|sashabushush]] || [[word:sashab|sashab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:sashabuthu|sashabuthu]] || [[word:sashabuju|sashabuju]] || [[word:sashabushu|sashabushu]] || [[word:sashabu|sashabu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:sashabufuth|sashabufuth]] || [[word:sashabufuj|sashabufuj]] || [[word:sashabufush|sashabufush]] || [[word:sashabuf|sashabuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:sashabethe|sashabethe]] || [[word:sashabeje|sashabeje]] || [[word:sashabeshe|sashabeshe]] || [[word:sashabe|sashabe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:sashabothoth|sashabothoth]] || [[word:sashabojoj|sashabojoj]] || [[word:sashaboshosh|sashaboshosh]] || [[word:sashab|sashab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:sashabotho|sashabotho]] || [[word:sashabojo|sashabojo]] || [[word:sashabosho|sashabosho]] || [[word:sashabo|sashabo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:sashabofoth|sashabofoth]] || [[word:sashabofoj|sashabofoj]] || [[word:sashabofosh|sashabofosh]] || [[word:sashabof|sashabof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:sashab忙th忙|sashab忙th忙]] || [[word:sashab忙j忙|sashab忙j忙]] || [[word:sashab忙sh忙|sashab忙sh忙]] || [[word:sashab忙|sashab忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:sashabathath|sashabathath]] || [[word:sashabajaj|sashabajaj]] || [[word:sashabashash|sashabashash]] || [[word:sashab|sashab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:sashabatha|sashabatha]] || [[word:sashabaja|sashabaja]] || [[word:sashabasha|sashabasha]] || [[word:sashaba|sashaba]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:sashabafath|sashabafath]] || [[word:sashabafaj|sashabafaj]] || [[word:sashabafash|sashabafash]] || [[word:sashabaf|sashabaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:sashabasha|sashabasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gosashabasha|gosashabasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokisashabasha|gokisashabasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:sashabn眉sha|sashabn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gosashabnkn眉sha|gosashabnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokisashabn眉sha|gokisashabn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:sashabsh毛sha|sashabsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosashabnksh毛sha|gosashabnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisashabsh毛sha|gokisashabsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sashabrosha|sashabrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosashabnkrosha|gosashabnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisashabrosha|gokisashabrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sashabmusha|sashabmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gosashabnkmusha|gosashabnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisashabmusha|gokisashabmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:sashabsherasha|sashabsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gosashabnksherasha|gosashabnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokisashabsherasha|gokisashabsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:sashabngasha|sashabngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gosashabnkngasha|gosashabnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokisashabngasha|gokisashabngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:sashabyasha|sashabyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gosashabnkyasha|gosashabnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokisashabyasha|gokisashabyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:sashabyamasha|sashabyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gosashabnkyamasha|gosashabnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokisashabyamasha|gokisashabyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:sashabn眉sh毛sha|sashabn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosashabnkn眉sh毛sha|gosashabnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisashabn眉sh毛sha|gokisashabn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sashabn眉rosha|sashabn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosashabnkn眉rosha|gosashabnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisashabn眉rosha|gokisashabn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sashabn眉musha|sashabn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosashabnkn眉musha|gosashabnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisashabn眉musha|gokisashabn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:sashabsh毛n眉sha|sashabsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosashabnksh毛n眉sha|gosashabnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisashabsh毛n眉sha|gokisashabsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sashabsh毛rosha|sashabsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosashabnksh毛rosha|gosashabnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisashabsh毛rosha|gokisashabsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sashabsh毛musha|sashabsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosashabnksh毛musha|gosashabnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisashabsh毛musha|gokisashabsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:sashabron眉sha|sashabron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosashabnkron眉sha|gosashabnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisashabron眉sha|gokisashabron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:sashabrosh毛sha|sashabrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosashabnkrosh毛sha|gosashabnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisashabrosh毛sha|gokisashabrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sashabromusha|sashabromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosashabnkromusha|gosashabnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisashabromusha|gokisashabromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:sashabmun眉sha|sashabmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosashabnkmun眉sha|gosashabnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisashabmun眉sha|gokisashabmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:sashabmush毛sha|sashabmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosashabnkmush毛sha|gosashabnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisashabmush毛sha|gokisashabmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sashabmurosha|sashabmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosashabnkmurosha|gosashabnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisashabmurosha|gokisashabmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:sashab|sashab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:s忙sh忙b|s忙sh忙b]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hosashab|hosashab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hos忙sh忙b|hos忙sh忙b]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohosashab|hohosashab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohos忙sh忙b|hohos忙sh忙b]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉sashab|n眉sashab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉s忙sh忙b|n眉s忙sh忙b]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉sashab|n眉n眉sashab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉s忙sh忙b|n眉n眉s忙sh忙b]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂sashab|n茂sashab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂s忙sh忙b|n茂s忙sh忙b]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂sashab|n茂n茂sashab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂s忙sh忙b|n茂n茂s忙sh忙b]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lusashab|lusashab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lus忙sh忙b|lus忙sh忙b]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulusashab|lulusashab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulus忙sh忙b|lulus忙sh忙b]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lisashab|lisashab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lis忙sh忙b|lis忙sh忙b]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilisashab|lilisashab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilis忙sh忙b|lilis忙sh忙b]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kosashab|kosashab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kos忙sh忙b|kos忙sh忙b]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokosashab|kokosashab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokos忙sh忙b|kokos忙sh忙b]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kesashab|kesashab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kes忙sh忙b|kes忙sh忙b]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekesashab|kekesashab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekes忙sh忙b|kekes忙sh忙b]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1f1e26d}}
